node.title: Uber India online Assignment for SDE II (frontend)

topic.title: Uber India online Assignment for SDE II (frontend)

post.content:
Codesignal Online Assignment consisted of:
8MCQ + 2DS Algo question (1easy and 1 medium)

Since, I applied for a frontend role, Language restriction of using only Javascript was there.

2 Algo questions were:
- https://leetcode.com/problems/subtract-the-product-and-sum-of-digits-of-an-integer/
- https://leetcode.com/problems/construct-k-palindrome-strings/
Can you pls share your onsite interview experience?
So Online Assessment Coding questions had to be solved using javascript only ???
Did you apply online or how did recruiter reached you ?
Sample questions for practise: https://mohit8.gumroad.com/l/ygass\nOr can practise at PrepareFrontend - https://preparefrontend.com
